# CWE-941 vulnerable: misdirected outbound notification
lang: go
file: CWE-941-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-941: Incorrectly Specified Destination in a Communication Channel.
// Vulnerable: password reset email sent to unvalidated address from query param.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"net/smtp"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	ID    uint
	Email string
}

func SendResetLink(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		email := c.Query("email")
		token := c.Query("token")
		body := fmt.Sprintf("Reset here: https://app.example/reset?token=%s", token)
		msg := []byte("To: " + email + "\r\nSubject: Reset\r\n\r\n" + body)
		if err := smtp.SendMail("smtp.example.com:587", nil, "noreply@example.com", []string{email}, msg); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		var user User
		db.Where("email = ?", email).First(&user)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"sent": true})
	}
}
